# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Alfavet delivers compassionate veterinary care across two Jerusalem branches. Book appointments online and give your pet the expert attention they deserve.

### Services
https://example.com/services
From routine vaccinations to comprehensive health exams, our veterinarian team provides modern pet care solutions. Explore our full range of veterinary services today.

### Branches
https://example.com/branches
Visit either of our accessible eastside veterinary clinic branches in Jerusalem. Find the location nearest you and experience quality pet care close to home.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Request an appointment through our easy online booking system. Our Jerusalem veterinary clinic staff will confirm your visit and answer all your pet care questions.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.
